Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class MetadataContainerMember

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataContainerMember
public class MetadataContainerMember extends SObject

Java class for MetadataContainerMember complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MetadataContainerMember">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Content" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentEntity" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentEntityId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImplementorType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastSyncDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MetadataContainer" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MetadataContainerId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
